name: seo-content
description: Write SEO-optimized blog content and metadata that ranks on Google
logic: Step 1: Check brand-voice.md for brand consistency.
Step 4: For each variation, include Title Tag, Meta Description, and H1 Header.
Step 6: Generate main article with H2/H3 subheadings, FAQ section, and Conclusion.
Step 7: Finalize with a Psychology Breakdown for the search intent.
